steps.title: Find the conversion factor from feet to inches
steps.content: The scale is 1 inch = $\frac{17}{3}$ feet. To convert feet to inches, we invert: 1 foot = $\frac{3}{17}$ inches.

steps.title: Apply the conversion factor to x feet
steps.content: Multiply $x$ feet by the conversion factor: $$x \cdot \frac{3}{17} = \frac{3x}{17}$$ inches. That matches choice C — C is correct.
